About Quantfi
# Built by People Who've Been in **Every Seat**
Investors. Bankers. Operators. We've seen what works.
### We Kept Seeing the Same Pattern
Companies hit the same finance problems:
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/68234f7dbfa0f46d31d32bb3_check-square.svg)
No reliable metrics
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/68234f7dbfa0f46d31d32bb3_check-square.svg)
Hires can't cover everything
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/68234f7dbfa0f46d31d32bb3_check-square.svg)
Reporting doesn't serve investors
**The Outcome:** Close faster, report accurately, scale without rebuilding your entire finance stack.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697cf4dc0165a73a6f05074a_about-image1%20\(6\).webp)
### **Why We Built QuantFi**
One person can't do it all. Multiple vendors don't coordinate. We provide specialists + coordination.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697cf4e02ca00850542a5ea6_about-image4%20\(6\).webp)
## Why Our Background Matters
This perspective shaped how we built QuantFi.  

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce6d1d51abb482dd08802_background-icon1.png)
### **We've Been the Investor**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce6d10b35709c2964db08_background-icon2.png)
### **We've Been the Service Provider**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce6d153f18b47709d00cf_background-icon3.png)
### **We've Been the Operator**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce6d18ee41df7e13df202_background-icon4.png)
### **The Insight This Gives Us**
## What Sets QuantFi Apart
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce9062bc8efbe71fa135b_about-icon1.png)
### **Practitioner-Built, Not Consultant-Designed**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce90671e169469c21f804_about-icon2.png)
### **Cross-Pollinated Best Practices**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce906a8f0aa9edd637ae6_about-icon3.png)
### **Team Model, Not Solo Operator**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce9065a5f6b692ead5d03_about-icon4.png)
### **Embedded in Your Operations**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce906f6f86bc1bbffdcc8_about-icon5.png)
### **Process Documentation**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/6822afddbf50ec64af9de4cf_Grid%20Background.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/6822afddbf50ec64af9de4cf_Grid%20Background.png)
## The People Behind Your Finance Function
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa0b6/6837737d643613df77ccaed9_Christian.jpeg)
### Christian Sanford
Co-Founder, Managing Partner
Christian Sanford is a co-founder of QuantFi, where he helps PE- and VC-backed businesses build investor-grade finance functions, drive strategic clarity, and prepare for and execute transactions. Prior to launching QuantFi, he served as a Fractional CFO for investor-backed companies, focusing on strategy, forecasting, and capital markets, and also executed M&A transactions for sponsors. Earlier in his career, Christian was an investor at Long Pond Capital, a $2.5B hedge fund specializing in real estate and related securities. He began his career in investment banking at Barclays, advising on more than $20B of M&A and capital markets transactions. Christian holds a BBA and an MSA in Accounting from Texas Tech University.
‍
[](https://www.linkedin.com/in/christiansanford/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa0b6/6837738552f3817f0666eb8e_Kenny.jpeg)
### Kenny Jen
Co-Founder, Managing Partner
Kenny Jen is a co-founder of QuantFi, where he leads financial strategy for investor-backed companies navigating scale, profitability, and capital allocation. He partners directly with founders, executives, as well as investors to turn financial data and infrastructure into a competitive advantage. His work spans pricing and margin strategy, working capital optimization, and departmental planning for companies from launch through $250M in ARR. Kenny has overseen more than $100M in spend across consumer, SaaS, and manufacturing, guiding capital allocation and operational decisions that drive profitable growth. Before QuantFi, he held senior finance roles at Pilot.com, Pure Beauty, Emil Capital Partners, and Credit Suisse. He brings the perspective of both investor and operator, with a track record of transforming financial insights into actionable tactics. Kenny holds a BSBA in Finance from Georgetown University.
[](https://www.quantfi.us/about)
## Who We Work With
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce9c5117f62157e4495ca_work-with1.png)
### **Scaling businesses**
that found product-market fit and need financial infrastructure to support growth
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce9c57e0f635e1f9db59d_work-with2.png)
### **Pre-transaction companies**
preparing for fundraising, sale, or investor due diligence
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce9c529a03122996e8676_work-with3.png)
### **Portfolio companies**
requiring investor-grade reporting without full finance headcount
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ce9c531815219a13abb8d_work-with4.png)
### **Established businesses**
looking to professionalize finance before bringing in outside capital
## How We Work
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ceb559e0963ac1359852d_how-icon1.png)
### **Priorities Over Perfection**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ceb551374be999ff1e09c_how-icon2.png)
### **Clarity Over Complexity**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ceb55b3c611149c6aa181_how-icon3.png)
### **Process Over Individual Brilliance**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/697ceb554beaa47d7fbd5077_how-icon4.png)
### **Partnership Over Transactions**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/6822afddbf50ec64af9de4cf_Grid%20Background.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa06e/6822afddbf50ec64af9de4cf_Grid%20Background.png)
## Let's Talk About Your Finance Function
Schedule a diagnostic call. We'll discuss where you are, what you're trying to accomplish, and whether QuantFi is the right fit.
[Schedule a Diagnostic Call](https://www.quantfi.us/contact)
